global_description: Flat, diamond-shaped marine creature with wide, wing-like pectoral fins extending from sides, smooth skin, often gray or brown, long slender tail, small eyes on top of head.

part_details.body: Flat, diamond-shaped, smooth skin, often gray or brown
part_details.eyes: Small, positioned on top of head

spatial_relations: Pectoral fins extend from sides of body
Tail extends from rear of body
Eyes positioned on top of head
